en: Make sure your uniforms are covering the sidewalks, entrances, and exits.
ko: 유니폼이 인도와 출입구를 가리고 있는지 확인해.

en: Hey, let's have periodic sweeps of the men's lab.
You here. What qualifies me to be a future stewardess?
ko: 내가 미래의 승무원이 되기 위한 자격은 뭐지?

en: Well, I think that I'm really friendly and I can really help out
ko: 나는 정말 친절하고, 사람들을 환영할 수 있다고 생각해.

en: and make people feel welcome on the plane and ...
We'll be traveling at 6,000 miles per hour at an altitude of 300 feet.
All my bags are packed. I'm ready to go.
